title: PM-Schema-UI-002F Handoff Demotion
objective: Normalize the parent-root `pm-schema-ui-002f` draft-publication handoff so it no longer presents itself as a still-live queue step after standalone repo cutover and instead acts as historical packet provenance with explicit current-routing redirects.
dependency_note: After Packet 162 demoted the parent-root `pm-schema-ui-002e` draft-publication handoff, the adjacent `pm-schema-ui-002f` handoff became the next strongest current-looking residue at the end of the read-only UI chain. Its scope line was already historical, but the title, summary wording, `Why This Packet Is Next`, and follow-on section still read like a live queue step.
execution_scope: Retitle the pm-schema-ui-002f draft-publication handoff as historical provenance.
Add an explicit historical note and current-routing block.
Relabel the live queue headings and present-tense queue wording without rewriting the full historical body.
forbidden_scope: broad handoff-archive rewriting beyond top-of-file demotion and heading normalization
success_criteria: The pm-schema-ui-002f draft-publication handoff now reads as historical provenance instead of a live queue step.
The file explicitly routes current readers to `PROJECT_STATUS.md` and the closeout inventory.
Repo-owned status routing records the closure and truthfully captures that no untracked `pm-schema-ui*` packet remains after this handoff family.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-04-22-parent-root-pm-schema-ui-002f-draft-publication-handoff.md -Pattern '^# Historical Parent-Root PM-Schema-UI-002F Draft Publication Handoff$','^Historical note: this handoff records one bounded parent-root draft-publication decision from before the canonical repo boundary moved to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform` on 2026-05-07\..*','^Current routing:$','^## 2\. Historical Why This Packet Was Next$','^## 9\. Historical Follow-On After This Packet$'

Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-04-22-parent-root-pm-schema-ui-002f-draft-publication-handoff.md -Pattern '^# Parent-Root PM-Schema-UI-002F Draft Publication Handoff$','^## 2\. Why This Packet Is Next$','^## 9\. Follow-On After This Packet$'
next_action: Re-evaluate the remaining non-UI draft-publication backlog and identify the next truthful adjacent current-looking residue surface before continuing the demotion lane.
